# Security Policy

## Supported version

Security fixes are applied to the current version on the `main` branch. Older
commits and preview deployments are not supported release channels.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report suspected vulnerabilities through
[GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/th91br/Esportiz/security/advisories/new).

Do not open a public issue, discussion, or pull request containing exploit
details, credentials, personal data, or steps that could put users at risk.

Include, when possible:

- the affected route, component, or service;
- a clear reproduction path;
- the observed and expected behavior;
- the security impact;
- any safe proof of concept or relevant logs with secrets removed.

We aim to acknowledge a report within two business days and provide an initial
assessment within five business days. Timelines for a fix depend on severity,
scope, and the need for coordinated disclosure.

## Disclosure

Please allow time for investigation and remediation before public disclosure.
We will coordinate disclosure and credit with the reporter when appropriate.
